description:
This catalog contains the reference datasets generated under Work Package 2 (WP2) of the 4DHydro project.
WP2 focuses on creating a standardized, high-resolution Land Surface Models (LSM) and Hydrological Models (HM) dataset.
The products include key terrestrial essential climate variables (tECVs) such as soil moisture, precipitation, evapotranspiration, and more.
These datasets support the integration of Earth Observation (EO) data and LSM/HM modeling to advance the understanding of the hydrological cycle and improve water resource management.
title: WP2 Products
